ops.code:
import omnivm
data = bytes(range(256)) * 4096
omnivm.set_buffer('megabuf', data, 0)
print(f'Python: set {len(data)} byte buffer')

var buf = omnivm.getBuffer("megabuf"); var arr = new Uint8Array(buf); var sum = 0; for (var i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) sum += arr[i]; console.log("JS: got " + arr.length + " bytes, checksum=" + sum);

buf = OmniVM.get_buffer('megabuf')
puts "Ruby: got #{buf.length} bytes, checksum=#{buf.bytes.sum}"
var ab = new ArrayBuffer(8); new Float64Array(ab)[0] = 3.14159265; omnivm.setBuffer("pi", ab, 4); console.log("JS: set pi buffer (f64)");

import omnivm, struct
v = omnivm.get_buffer('pi')
print(f'Python: pi = {struct.unpack("d", bytes(v))[0]}')

buf = OmniVM.get_buffer('pi')
puts "Ruby: got pi buffer, " + buf.length.to_s + " bytes"

import omnivm
omnivm.release_buffer('megabuf')
omnivm.release_buffer('pi')
print('Buffers released')
